  "sceneId": "scene-3",

    "extract": "INT. NEWSROOM CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS - HANDHELD DYNAMIC\n\nPRODUCER (40s, rumpled linen shirt, editorial energy) rushes in, clutching a single printed sheet. Close-up macro: fingers grip crisp paper edge, subtle texture crinkle under directional shadow. Footsteps punchy on polished floor.\n\n                    PRODUCER\n          (breathless, thrusting paper)\n        Story just broke. Viral sensation --\n        a breakthrough serum dropping tonight.\n        Fresh from the lab: #E8F4E8 glow in a drop.\n        We need this on air NOW.",
    "dialogue": [

      }

}

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>

response.content: {"visual":{"fullPrompt":"Handheld dynamic macro close-up in 16:9, PRODUCER in rumpled linen shirt with sleeve rolled up, fingers tensed gripping the crisp edge of a single printed sheet clutched tightly mid-rush forward, subtle paper texture crinkling under grip, potential energy in forward stride with punchy footsteps on glossy polished floor, sleek modern newsroom corridor stretching behind with warm beige tones and high ceilings, adjacent open newsroom visible with airy sleek desks clustered under glowing terminals, vast rain-streaked glass walls framing distant urban twilight glow, bright golden hour twilight natural window light flooding in from side casting clean directional shadows across hand and paper edge with crisp highlights and warm rim light on fabric folds, high-key airy mood with tactile editorial energy, shallow depth of field softly blurring corridor depth into bokeh glow of screens and window flares, clean bright Glossier-inspired grading with true-to-life warmth in highlights lifted shadows and pops of contrast, every surface sensory-sharp like modern social-first product photography capturing urgent real-life motion.","negativePrompt":"holographic screens, floating interfaces, text overlays, subtitles, blurry motion, overexposed highlights, heavy diffusion, dark shadows, unrealistic lighting, wide angle distortion, deep depth of field, static pose, multiple characters, outdoor elements","components":{"sceneDescription":"Dynamic macro close-up of PRODUCER rushing in corridor clutching printed sheet, handheld energy implying forward motion into newsroom.","subject":"PRODUCER in rumpled linen shirt, hand gripping crisp printed paper edge mid-stride.","environment":"Sleek modern newsroom corridor with polished floors, adjacent airy newsroom with desks, glowing terminals, rain-streaked vast glass walls.","lighting":"Golden hour twilight natural window light, directional shadows on paper and hand, high-key airy with crisp highlights and warm rim light.","camera":"Handheld dynamic macro close-up, shallow depth of field, 16:9 framing with natural micro-movement.","composition":"Tight focus on hand and paper with blurred corridor depth, foreground tension leading to background newsroom expanse.","style":"Modern social-first editorial product photography, Glossier clean bright grading, tactile sensory details.","technical":"16:9 aspect ratio, ultra high resolution, intricate textures on paper and fabric, photorealistic.","atmosphere":"Urgent breathless editorial energy, fresh sensory effortlessly cool, golden twilight immediacy."}},"continuity":{"characterTags":["producer"],"environmentTag":"newsroom_corridor_polished","elementTags":[],"colorPalette":"#FFFFFF, #F0E6D3,
